I plan on using them for many projects in the future” — David Oblas - President - National Fighting Championship ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5c25345731d4dfb9bfbd6e2a/1545948256589-OV569178HM80U8P4MTH6/image-asset.jpeg?format=1500w) **Services** ## WHAT WE OFFER We are a boutique marketing, advertising, and business consulting agency located in Atlanta, Georgia. We are passionate about helping small and medium-sized businesses grow, leveraging our extensive industry knowledge and proven strategies. ## LIST OF SERVICES Digital Marketing, [Traditional Marketing](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/marketing), [Social Media Marketing](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/social-media-marketing), [Social Media Advertising](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/social-media-advertising), Hospitality Consulting, [Content Creation](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/content-creation), Strategy Sessions, [Email Marketing](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/email-marketing), [Paid Media, Google Ads](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/advertising), Branding, [Public Relations](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/publicrelations), [Web Design](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/website-design), SEO, [SEM](https://www.okellyconsulting.com/advertising), Print, Events, Web Presence, and more!
